{
  "code": "export function createIdempotencyGuard() { const seen=new Set(); return { check(k){ if(seen.has(k)) return false; seen.add(k); return true; } }; }",
  "explanation": "Tracks keys in a Set",
  "complexity": {
    "time": "O(1)",
    "space": "O(n)"
  },
  "tests": [
    "empty",
    "dup",
    "stable",
    "unicode",
    "nullish"
  ]
}
